provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, Architect archive node excavation — a dense polyhedral object roughly one meter across, half-embedded in asteroid rock, surface showing micro-etched fractal patterns, slightly too regular to be natural, a multi-species research team setting up scanning equipment around it, the node's pale luminescent veins glowing faintly as if responding to proximity, ancient mystery
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi

judgment.explanation: Strong hit — concept reads clearly, style consistent, gritty lived-in aesthetic.
